mapper.select: SELECT wr.*, u.username as userName, u.phone, p.name as petName FROM warning_record wr LEFT JOIN user u ON wr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pet p ON wr.pet_id = p.id WHERE wr.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id as userId, u.username as uerName, u.phone, COUNT(*) as warningCount, MAX(wr.warning_level) as maxWarningLevel FROM warning_record wr INNER JOIN user u ON wr.user_id = u.id WHERE wr.status = 1 AND wr.warning_level >= 2 GROUP BY wr.user_id ORDER BY maxWarningLevel DESC, warningCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
